name: io.github.Pantani/tdmcp
title: tdmcp — TouchDesigner MCP server
description: Build real visual systems in TouchDesigner from plain language with Claude, Cursor or Codex.

environmentVariables.name: TDMCP_TOOL_PROFILE
environmentVariables.description: Tool exposure profile. Glama and MCP directory scanners use directory for a compact build/inspect surface; choose full for the complete installed runtime or safe to hide destructive/raw-code tools.

environmentVariables.name: TDMCP_RAW_PYTHON
environmentVariables.description: Keep client-authored Python escape-hatch tools hidden by default in registry scans; choose on only for a trusted local runtime.
